name: Pollo Pibil
recipeIngredient: 4 Large Banana Leaf Sections, including the center rib
recipeInstructions:
If you don't have banana leaves for this Yucatan specialty, use foil only.
Prepare Recado Colorado (see below). Add garlic. Mash to blend; set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a medium skillet. Add onion. Cook until tender but not browned; set aside.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Cut four 20-inch sheets of aluminum foil. Place 1 sheet of foil on a flat surface.
Place banana leaf in the center of foil. Rub 1 chicken quarter with some of the remaining oil. Place chicken on banana leaf.
Spread 1/4 of the Recado Colorado mixture over chicken with the back of a spoon. Sprinkle with salt. Add 1/4 of the cooked onion.
Wrap banana leaf around chicken to cover. Fold foil over banana leaf and crimp to close securely. If you use small pieces of banana leaf, overlap them to enclose chicken completely.
Continue until all chicken quarters are seasoned and wrapped. Place in a single layer in a large baking pan. Bake for 1 hour.
Remove foil and drain off excess juices. Serve chicken wrapped in the leaves.
Makes 4 servings.
RECADO COLORADO
1 Tablespoon Crushed Achiote seeds OR New Mexico Chili Powder
2 Tablespoons Lime juice, Lemon juice, or vinegar
1 Pinch Turmeric
Combine all ingredients and mash to make a paste. Makes about 3 tablespoons.
